response.justification: Strong general software engineering credentials with 15+ years of production experience and current Staff-level role, but lacks demonstrated expertise in the core domain. Missing evidence of building experimentation platforms, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, feature flagging systems, or data-driven growth work that are central to this role. Could potentially transition into this specialty given foundational skills, but would require significant domain ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years production engineering across multiple languages and scales (handled millions of requests/transactions at Dunnhumby)
Proven technical leadership through Staff roles and strong mentoring track record (Refactoring Dojos, courses, workshops)
Demonstrated platform building and end-to-end ownership (GISCollective open-source platform, multiple full-stack systems)
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, or A/B testing infrastructure (4+ years preferred qualification entirely missing)
Minimal evidence of metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, statistical analysis, or data science collaboration required for role
Background is primarily engineering-focused rather than cross-functional product/growth work; limited evidence of translating business goals into measurement frameworks

key_factors.factor: Strong foundational engineering and scale experience
